case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BENITZ, RICHARD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $677.90 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BENITZ, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BENITZ, RICHARD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENITZ, RICHARD $667.90 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $693.90, PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $25.00 ON 04/30/03; $250.00 ON 05/30/03; AND THE BALANCE OF $167.90 ON 06/30/03. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BENITZ, RICHARD
